queries.label: Primary Group Onboarding Config
queries.soql: SELECT RecordType.DeveloperName, RecordTypeId, cfs_ob__Bottler__c, cfs_ob__Business_Unit__c, cfs_ob__Sales_Office__c, cfs_ob__Primary_Group_Number__c, cfs_ob__Primary_Group__c FROM cfs_ob__Onboarding_Config__c WHERE cfs_ob__Record_Category__c = 'Primary Group' AND cfs_ob__Bottler__c = '5000'
